expectations.text: AnimatePresence stays mounted (not wrapped in conditional)
Has exit prop on the animated element
expectations.evidence: Line 65: exit={{ opacity: 0 }} on wrapper; Line 79: exit={{ opacity: 0 }} on backdrop; Line 89: exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }} on dialog
Line 86: initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}, Line 87: animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}

expectations.text: Children of AnimatePresence have unique key props
expectations.evidence: The single direct child of AnimatePresence (line 61 motion.div) has no explicit key prop. It works as the only child but doesn't follow best practice.
